behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the header keys (HTTP-Referer, X-Title), literal values (https://www.continue.dev/, Continue), class names (OpenRouterApi, OpenAIApi), and precedence behavior that tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior without prescribing exact code changes or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests inspect api.config.requestOptions.headers which is a reasonable contract; alternative implementations storing headers in config would all pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests instantiate classes via Node subprocess and inspect runtime config.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert specific header values and precedence semantics; stub returning defaults wouldn't satisfy both default and override tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover default headers, user precedence, and non-pollution of OpenAIApi base class as described.

informative_test_structure.reason: Each test is a named function with clear docstring describing the behavior tested.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Mentions OpenRouterApi class which is the natural target, no line numbers leaked.
